prompt:
Using a face from a reference photo with 100% identical and consistent similarity, create a semi-abstract digital portrait illustration in a cinematic futuristic samurai style. The main character is a young Japanese man with naturally messy medium-length hair, detailed hair texture, messy strands of hair blown by the gentle wind, a cold expression, a serious and mysterious lowered gaze. The body pose is half-sideways with his hand holding a long katana elegantly in front of his body.

The character wears a modern samurai outfit in dark black, a combination of futuristic kimono and tactical fabric, detailed rough texture, complex layering, oversized sleeves, and natural shadow details. The katana sword has a realistic design with smooth metal reflections.

The visual style is a blend of abstract digital painting, glitch art, fragmented shards, and cyber brush textures. The characters' bodies are partially decomposed into abstract geometric fragments, glass shards, artistic debris, futuristic architectural lines, digital distortion elements, and layered, sharp shapes that blend into the background.

A vertical portrait composition with artistic framing, centered on the character with ample negative space. The background is a light, pale beige color, with dynamic abstract elements scattered throughout in dark blue and black. Fragment effects, rough brushstrokes, digital paint textures, motion fragments, artistic noise, and thin, futuristic lines surround the character's body.

The dominant color tones are navy blue, dark teal, black, light beige, and pale gray. Soft, cinematic, high-contrast lighting with soft, dramatic lighting from the sides creates elegant shadows and artistic depth. The melancholic, futuristic, mysterious, stylish, and elegantly chaotic feel.

Style ultra detailed, abstract cyber samurai illustration, cinematic composition, expressive brush texture, shattered effect, modern Japanese aesthetic, highly detailed digital painting, premium artstation quality, ultra sharp details, soft grain, realistic anatomy, dynamic fragments, elegant composition, masterpiece quality, 8k. rasio 9:16
